case_title: ALLAN SCHWARTZ VS. GO DADDY INC.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT GO DADDY INC. MAILED TO RESPONDENT SCHWARTZ, ALLAN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SCHWARTZ, ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT GO DADDY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ALLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GO DADDY INC. $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,015.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF ALLAN SCHWARTZ $900.00 DAMAGES FOR ATTEMPTING TO MARKET DOMAIN NAME AFTER CHASE CREDIT CARD CANCELLED CHARGE BY GO DADDY FOR APPROXIMATELY $200.00 FOR DOMAIN NAME SERVICES. COURT FINDS TRANSACTION RESCINDED AND ORDER GO DADDY TO RETURN DOMAIN NAME TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
ABANDONMENT OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT GO DADDY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIF FALLAN SCHWARTZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GO DADDY, REPRESENTED BY NICOLE BLAKELY, LEGAL INVESTIGATION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
